metadata.name: Handle a Vessel Agent Query about Port Charges

description: A vessel agent calls to get an estimate of port charges for an upcoming vessel call.

nodes.task_description: Obtain the vessel's details (GT, LOA) and planned activities (number of container moves) from the agent.

expected_outcome.value: Operator gathers all necessary information for the estimate.

nodes.task_description: Use the port tariff document to look up the rates for wharfage, pilotage, and stevedoring.

expected_outcome.value: Operator finds the correct rates based on the vessel's size and cargo volume.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the estimated total cost and provide it to the agent, stating that it is a non-binding estimate.

expected_outcome.value: A pro-forma invoice is generated and communicated to the agent with a disclaimer.
